title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Navistar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Navistar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mahindra Navistar! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!
